prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年物理类最低位次约16003→19346→16551→20484，整体呈波动后移趋势，近3年累计后移约4400名；2025年基准约20484名，为近年最高（位次数字最大 ）；本省物理类计划2022年99人、2023年108人、2024年97人、2025年99人；2026年计划111人，较2025年扩招12人（+12.1%），扩招幅度较大，理论上降 低录取门槛。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第79名，较2021年100名、2025年80名持续上升，近年排名稳步提升；近年声誉平稳，未 见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音热度排名第80位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量处于中等偏下水平，报考关注度不突出；民族学A+、社会学A-、中国语言 文学A-，与物理类招生专业（计算机类、电子信息类、统计学类等）关联度较低，对理工科考生吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等理 工科专业持续高热推荐，相关专业报考竞争加剧；四川省2026年普通高考总人数约53.5万，较2025年物理类+历史类合计约46.3万大幅增加约7.2万人（+15.5%），按近年比例估算 物理类考生约32.9万，较2025年28.5万增加约4.4万人，竞争显著加剧；中央民族大学位于北京，在四川无特殊地域偏好；该校 在四川招生计划占比较小，地域因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026年扩招12人（+12.1%）降低门槛、但四川省物理类考生大幅增加约4.4万人加 剧竞争，以及学校软科排名持续上升提升吸引力，扩招与考生增加两股力量对冲后，考生规模增长对竞争的影响略占主导。在2025年基准20484名基础上，预计2026年最低位次约2 1774名，区间21274–22274名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category fluctuated approximately 16003 → 19346 → 16551 → 20484, showing an overall trend of moving backward with fluctuations, with a cumulative backward shift of about 4400 positions in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 20484, the highest in recent years (largest ranking number); the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 99 in 2022, 108 in 2023, 97 in 2024, and 99 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 111, an increase of 12 students (+12.1%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, theoretically lowering the admission threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking, approximately 79th in 2026, continuously rising from 100th in 2021 and 80th in 2025, with steady improvement in recent years; recent reputation is stable, with no obvious negative public opinion or enrollment gaps; Douyin popularity ranking is 80th, rated as 'average', with short video exposure at a medium-low level, and application attention is not prominent; Ethnology A+, Sociology A-, Chinese Language and Literature A-, which have low correlation with Physics Category enrollment majors (Computer Class, Electronic Information Class, Statistics Class, etc.), offering limited appeal to science and engineering candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Class, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other science and engineering majors continue to be highly recommended, with increased competition for related majors; the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Sichuan Province in 2026 is approximately 535,000, a significant increase of about 72,000 (+15.5%) compared to the total of about 463,000 for Physics + History categories in 2025; estimated Physics Category candidates are about 329,000, an increase of about 44,000 from 285,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Minzu University of China is located in Beijing, with no special regional preference in Sichuan; the university's enrollment plan in Sichuan accounts for a small proportion, so regional factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating backward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 expansion of 12 students (+12.1%) lowering the threshold, but the significant increase of about 44,000 Physics Category candidates in Sichuan Province intensifying competition, and the continuous rise in the university's Soft Science ranking enhancing its appeal, the two forces of expansion and candidate increase offset each other, with the impact of candidate growth on competition slightly dominating. Based on the 2025 baseline of 20484, the estimated minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 21774, with a range of 21274–22274.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Class (including Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Electronic Information Class (including Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, Artificial Intelligence)
- Law Class (including Law, Law (International Rule of Law))
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering
- Information and Computing Science
- Statistics Class (including Statistics, Applied Statistics)
- Nanomaterials and Technology
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Biological Science Class (including Biological Science, Ecology)
- Environmental Science and Engineering Class (including Environmental Engineering, Environmental Science, Chemistry)
- Business Administration Class (including Business Administration, Accounting, Financial Management, Human Resource Management)
- Economics Class (including Economics, Public Finance, Finance, International Economics and Trade)
- Foreign Language and Literature Class (including English, Translation)
- Journalism and Communication Class (including Journalism, Advertising, Network and New Media)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 21274–22274, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<21274), you can focus on aiming for popular engineering majors like Computer Class and Electronic Information Class; if your ranking is in the middle of the range, prioritize moderate-difficulty majors like Statistics Class and Optoelectronic Information; if your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (>22274), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety options to secure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 2212→3030→2748→2788. After a significant drop in 2023, it has stabilized around 2700–2800 in recent two years. The baseline for 2025 is about 2788. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 48 in 2022, 47 in 2023, 58 in 2024, and 59 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 68, an increase of 9 students (+15.3%) compared to 2025, a significant expansion that theoretically lowers admission thresholds.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 79th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a continuous rise in recent years (100th in 2021 → 80th in 2025 → 79th in 2026), indicating improved comprehensive strength and recognition. Reputation has been stable recently, with no significant negative public opinion or record of admission gaps. Douyin popularity ranking is 80th, rated as "average," with no outstanding application attention. Ethnology A+ (top nationally), Sociology A-, Chinese Language and Literature A-, highly relevant to history category majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Law, History, Sociology, Ethnology, etc.), strongly attractive to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is divided with wait-and-see attitude, Chinese Language/Literature recommended, Teacher Training/Education divided with wait-and-see attitude. Popularity of liberal arts majors is divided but overall stable. In 2026, the total number of general college entrance exam takers in Sichuan is about 535,000, a significant increase from 2025. Estimated history category candidates are about 206,000, an increase of about 28,000 (+15.7%) from 178,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Minzu University of China is located in Beijing, with no special regional preference in Sichuan. Its enrollment plan in Sichuan accounts for a small proportion, so regional factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that historical rankings have stabilized around 2700–2800 in recent two years, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 9 students (+15.3%) lowers the threshold, but the significant increase of about 28,000 history category candidates in Sichuan intensifies competition, and the university's continuous rise in Soft Science ranking and advantageous disciplines (Ethnology A+, etc.) highly matching liberal arts majors enhance attractiveness. After offsetting the effects of expansion and candidate increase, the impact of candidate growth on competition slightly dominates. Based on the 2025 baseline of 2788, the estimated minimum ranking for 2026 is about 3013, with a range of 2712–3314.

- Chinese Language and Literature
- Law (including Law, Law (International Rule of Law))
- History

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 2712–3314, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<2712), you can focus on popular liberal arts majors such as Chinese Language and Literature, Law, and History. If your ranking is in the middle of the range, prioritize moderate-difficulty majors like Economics and Sociology. If your ranking is near the upper limit (>3314), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors for guaranteed admission.
